title: CleanAid® OneTouch Easy Mop with Wring Function Super Absorbent PVA Sponge with Telescopic Pole OneTouch EASY Wischer
features: ✅ BACK-FRIENDLY & EFFICIENT - The OneTouch Easy Floor Cleaner Mop from CleanAid features a long 140cm telescopic handle which is suitable for users of any height, meaning you can wipe your floors brilliantly clean whilst protecting your back.

✅ CLEAN & DRY HANDS - With the unique OneTouch lever system, you can easily remove as much excess water from our squeezy mop as you wish whilst keeping your hands clean and dry. Wet, dirty hands from wringing will become a thing of the past.

✅ SIMPLE & EFFICIENT - Our floor cleaning mops enable you to quickly and easily remove liquids and dirt for a streak-free, radiantly clean result. The sponge in this kitchen and bathroom mop is made of highly absorbent PVA material.

✅ VERSATILE - The OneTouch Easy Laminate Floor Mop is equally ideal for other smooth surfaces such as parquet, tiles, vinyl and more. Replacement sponges are also available from us and can be changed simply by loosening the screws (see product video).

✅ APPLICATION TIP - Soak the sponge in hot water for 2 to 5 minutes before first use until it is soft. You won't need to use a bucket with our sponge cleaning mops for floors, but we recommend you always wring the sponge out and rinse it under fresh water for best results. Note: Do not clean the sponge with chlorine.
description: Product Description Without getting wet & dirty hands OneTouch Easy mop with super-absorbency The CleanAid OneTouch Easy is ideal for the efficient & streak-free cleaning of all smooth floors.Highlights of the OneTouch Easy mop include the highly-absorbent PVA sponge, which will remove liquids, dirt, dust and pet hairs (ideal for allergy sufferers) and the integrated OneTouch system, which ensures that your hands stay clean and dry whilst mopping. Floor cleaning with the OneTouch fun factor - that's the OneTouch Easy from CleanAid. Your ultimate helper in achieving clean WITHOUT getting wet and dirty hands Soak the sponge before use Please soak the sponge in warm water for about 5 minutes each time you use it. This allows you to effectively wring out the mop whilst wiping. System with wringing function The wringing function keeps your hands clean and dry. You can also quickly and easily achieve the desired moisture level of the sponge. Mop with fine-pored PVA sponge The OneTouch Easy mop from CleanAid consists of three handle segments that can be put together quickly and easily. How to change the sponge: To change the sponge, first loosen the 4 screws. Soak the new sponge in water, attach it to the mop head and tighten the screws again. CleanAid OneTouch GO!
